prompt:
Use case: differentiator beat
Primary request: Emphasize the anti-fluff stance with stark typography over disciplined system imagery. Blunt, premium, unsentimental, no people.
Scene/background: black and graphite background with faint terminal blocks and ruled grids, burnt orange underline accents
Subject: rejection of fluff and empty dashboards
Action: beat 1 (0-2s) the words appear one phrase at a time; beat 2 (2-4s) background system graphics resolve into a clean, restrained structure
Camera: locked frame with subtle texture motion
Lighting/mood: blunt, confident, unsentimental
Color palette: black, off-white, burnt orange
Style/format: manifesto-style motion graphic
Audio: one dry impact per phrase, no dialogue
Text (verbatim): "NO DASHBOARDS. NO VIBES."
Constraints: text must dominate; no extra phrases; no people
Avoid: meme energy, flashy transitions, comedic tone
